author: Jaba - Unityfarmers
msg: [Photo] go to https://manage.unitynodes.io/rewards/allocation—> open devtools—> Enable logging, Check Preserve log, Check Disable cache—> reload page —> network tab—> json reward-get-allocation —> copy into word, save as text file, upload into dashboard
